title: Google probed by Swiss regulator over Android default search feature
summary: The "Choice Screen" feature allows users ‌to choose ⁠their default ⁠search engines during the initial set up of their new Android ​device. COMCO said Google had removed this feature in Switzerland, even though ​it remained available in other countries in Europe.

title: DeepSeek’s Liang Wenfeng tops Dario Amodei and Greg Brockman as richest AI founder
summary: Liang is now worth $36 billion, up from about $16.7 billion previously, according to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index. That ranks him well above Anthropic PBC co-founder Dario Amodei and OpenAI’s Greg Brockman.

title: Temasek offloads 2% stake in Lenskart for Rs 1,945 crore
summary: The sale was done on July 10 through open market transactions, taking Temasek's stake in Lenskart down to 4.75% from 6.8% earlier. On July 10, Lenskart's stock closed at Rs 543.65 on the National Stock Exchange.

title: SoftBank's Masayoshi Son says AI will need $5 trillion per year by 2040, dismisses bubble talk
summary: "The business model will be viable because by 2040, if AI revenue makes up 20% of ​global GDP, spending 800 trillion yen a year is a rounding error," Son said.

title: TCS’ annualised AI revenue rises to $2.6 billion in Q1
summary: The AI momentum came as TCS posted a 5% year-on-year rise in consolidated net profit to Rs 13,349 crore for the quarter ended June 30, while revenue increased 13.9% to Rs 72,275 crore. The company’s board has declared an interim dividend of Rs 12 per share.
